stan_swiata.opis: Second consecutive day of mutual US-Iran strikes; Strait of Hormuz remains closed — sustained conflict keeps oil supply disruption risk high, directly affecting Polish energy prices. Counter reset due to continued active exchanges.
Ukraine continues deep strikes inside Russia (military plant hit); conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — fading further into background.
Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise ties — potential shift in strategic balance affecting NATO posture, indirect relevance for Poland. Counter reset due to new confirmed visit.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17; ongoing Middle East conflict entangled with Iran situation — fading to background, minimal direct impact on Poland.
Pakistan air strikes in Afghanistan continue — regional flare-up with minimal direct impact on Poland, fading to background.
